item.title: Zune Files Salvage Tool [Office Apps]
item.itunes:title: Zune Files Salvage Tool [Office Apps]
item.itunes:author: datarecoverytools
item.itunes:summary:
Zune Files Salvage Tool
(Office Apps)
Zune Diagnostic Mode recovery utility supports retrieval of following formats of file for audio MP3 (.mp3), AAC (Low complexity), (.aac, .mp4, .m4a, .m4b, .mov), WMA (.wma), for video MPEG4 (.mp4, .m4v and .mov), WMV (.wmv), H.264 (.mp4, .m4v and .mov), ASF (.asf) and for still images JPEG (.jpg). Zune music files recovery software recovers virus affected deleted zunes synchronized music files, podcasts, digital pictures and audio videos files. Zune diagnostic problem solution utility restores corrupted Windows Media Players audio video music files. Zune disk mode error solution data recovery utility restores crashed zunes deleted files. Zune lost file recovery software repairs water damaged zunes streamed files and folder. Zune problem solving utility has read only permission so it does not affect other files in the disk and recovers zune library music files and folder safely. Zune backup data recovery software supports windows operating system including Windows 11, Windows 10,Windows 8, Windows 7, Windows XP (Home, Media center) and windows Vista. Feature:* Zune data recovery tool restores missing audio video clips, movie clip, digital picture and still images from digital media player.* Frozen zune recovery software recovers all the deleted audio video files and folders from damaged zune.* Zune drive data recovery utility restores music files even “drive not formatted” or “Device in not recognized” message is displayed on the screen.* Zune file recovery software retrieves deleted data which lost due to zunes wireless networking ability.* Zune audio video files retrieval tool retrieves music files from damaged Zune music player.* Zune data recovery tool is GUI (Graphical User Interface) based so it is easy to use.

[read more]
item.description:
Zune Files Salvage Tool
(Office Apps)
Zune Diagnostic Mode recovery utility supports retrieval of following formats of file for audio MP3 (.mp3), AAC (Low complexity), (.aac, .mp4, .m4a, .m4b, .mov), WMA (.wma), for video MPEG4 (.mp4, .m4v and .mov), WMV (.wmv), H.264 (.mp4, .m4v and .mov), ASF (.asf) and for still images JPEG (.jpg). [read more]

Zune Diagnostic Mode recovery utility supports retrieval of following formats of file for audio MP3 (.mp3), AAC (Low complexity), (.aac, .mp4, .m4a, .m4b, .mov), WMA (.wma), for video MPEG4 (.mp4, .m4v and .mov), WMV (.wmv), H.264 (.mp4, .m4v and .mov), ASF (.asf) and for still images JPEG (.jpg). item.title: Cell Phone Data Recovery Mac [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Cell Phone Data Recovery Mac [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: undeletefilesmac
item.itunes:summary:
Cell Phone Data Recovery Mac
(Utilities)
Are you sad after losing Mobile Phone priceless and valuable data? Don’t worry, just visit company website to download cell phone data recovery Mac software to reclaim all lost crucial contact numbers, photographs or other data from different type of mobile phones in less span of time. Innovative MAC mobile phone data undelete software empower with in-depth scanning and searching techniques that allowed user to bring back crucial data that lost due to any reason from mobile device within less span of time. Reliable MAC mobile phone data revival program restore accidentally deleted images, wedding photographs, memorable audio/video clipping, MP3 music or other data in few simple mouse clicks. Cell phone recovery Mac utility is fully capable to rescue lost business important and personal contact numbers along with their name or other details. Proficient mobile phone data undelete software easily restore wallpapers, screen savers, themes or animated pictures from formatted or logically crashed cellular phone of any manufacturer or brand. Professional data undelete utility offers a risk free solution to user for recovery of mobile phone stored data in most efficient and effective manner. Cell phone retrieval Mac tool provides comprehensive and safe recovery of lost precious snaps, images, photographs, or sound clips from damaged mobile phone at affordable price. Mobile phone data recovery software restores every single byte of lost data due to hardware/software error, accidental deletion, virus attacks etc. Features: * Cell phone data recovery Mac utility provides high resolution preview of missing data and files before actual retrieval process. * Cell phone data restoration utility has user friendly GUI and help guide that allow user to easily access software and perform recovery task without any guidance and help. * Mobile data rescue tool for Apple Macintosh OS X supports various types of mobile phones including Nokia, Blackberry, Motorola, Sony Ericsson etc.

[read more]

item.title: Pro Duo Memory Stick Files Recovery Tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Pro Duo Memory Stick Files Recovery Tool [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: datarecovery1
item.itunes:summary:
Pro Duo Memory Stick Files Recovery Tool
(Utilities)
Pro Duo memory card files recovery software salvage retrieve restore formatted corrupted office documents, digital pictures, mobile phone audio video songs, SMS, MMS, snaps and text messages from multimedia memory card. Fujifilm XD cards recovery utility support all type of media file like MPEG, WAV, MP3, AVI, GIF, BMP, JPEG, JPG and MIDI which are lost due to virus infection, software hardware malfunction, human errors, improper handling.

[read more]

item.title: TikTokMod [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:title: TikTokMod [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:author: dim4ugan
item.itunes:summary:
TikTokMod
(Chat & Messenging)
- Removed all ads
- Made video, GIFs downloading without watermark to Movies/TikTok folder instead of DCIM/Camera and pictures to Pictures/TikTok
- Removed all restrictions on downloads, you can download any video
- Removed many other restrictions
- Disabled unnecessary activities
- Removed restrictions on duets, stitching
- Rewind is now available in any video
- Battery drain optimization
- Removed regional restrictions
- Fixed Google authorization
- Fixed Facebook authorization
- Fixed Twitter authorization
- Enabled High Quality Audio for live steams
- Enabled High Quality Video for live streams
- Enabled HD Video upload button
- Disabled InAppBillingService
- Disabled all types of Analytics
- Disabled mandatory login
- Added author tag for the name of the downloaded file
- Added ability to download profile pictures
- Monet app icon for Android 13+
- Added playback speed selection button for all videos
- Changed the friends tab to discover as it was before
- Disabled data collection and sending to the TikTok server
- Added autoscroll button on FYP page
- Added partly dark mode which can be turned on if u use specific firmwares like MIUI/HyperOS
- Bypassing the prohibition to record the screen of live stream, the author of which prohibited to do it (previously it was a black screen)
- Bypassing the 60 second limit for live stream (When you attend a stream TikTok gives you 60 seconds to preview the live stream, after that the live stream only works for subscribers)
[read more]
item.description:
TikTokMod
(Chat & Messenging)
- Removed all ads
- Made video, GIFs downloading without watermark to Movies/TikTok folder instead of DCIM/Camera and pictures to Pictures/TikTok
- Removed all restrictions on downloads, you can download any video
- Removed many other restrictions
- Disabled unnecessary activities
- Removed restrictions on duets, stitching
- Rewind is now available in any video
- Battery drain optimization
- Removed regional restrictions
- Fixed Google authorization
- Fixed Facebook authorization
- Fixed Twitter authorization
- Enabled High Quality Audio for live steams
- Enabled High Quality Video for live streams
- Enabled HD Video upload button
- Disabled InAppBillingService
- Disabled all types of Analytics
- Disabled mandatory login
- Added author tag for the name of the downloaded file
- Added ability to download profile pictures
- Monet app icon for Android 13+
- Added playback speed selection button for all videos
- Changed the friends tab to discover as it was before
- Disabled data collection and sending to the TikTok server
- Added autoscroll button on FYP page
- Added partly dark mode which can be turned on if u use specific firmwares like MIUI/HyperOS
- Bypassing the prohibition to record the screen of live stream, the author of which prohibited to do it (previously it was a black screen)
- Bypassing the 60 second limit for live stream (When you attend a stream TikTok gives you 60 seconds to preview the live stream, after that the live stream only works for subscribers)
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
TikTokMod
(Chat & Messenging)
- Removed all ads
- Made video, GIFs downloading without watermark to Movies/TikTok folder instead of DCIM/Camera and pictures to Pictures/TikTok
- Removed all restrictions on downloads, you can download any video
- Removed many other restrictions
- Disabled unnecessary activities
- Removed restrictions on duets, stitching
- Rewind is now available in any video
- Battery drain optimization
- Removed regional restrictions
- Fixed Google authorization
- Fixed Facebook authorization
- Fixed Twitter authorization
- Enabled High Quality Audio for live steams
- Enabled High Quality Video for live streams
- Enabled HD Video upload button
- Disabled InAppBillingService
- Disabled all types of Analytics
- Disabled mandatory login
- Added author tag for the name of the downloaded file
- Added ability to download profile pictures
- Monet app icon for Android 13+
- Added playback speed selection button for all videos
- Changed the friends tab to discover as it was before
- Disabled data collection and sending to the TikTok server
- Added autoscroll button on FYP page
- Added partly dark mode which can be turned on if u use specific firmwares like MIUI/HyperOS
- Bypassing the prohibition to record the screen of live stream, the author of which prohibited to do it (previously it was a black screen)
- Bypassing the 60 second limit for live stream (When you attend a stream TikTok gives you 60 seconds to preview the live stream, after that the live stream only works for subscribers)
[read more]

item.title: ToolsBaer OST to HTML Conversion [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: ToolsBaer OST to HTML Conversion [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: michaelgeorge
item.itunes:summary:
ToolsBaer OST to HTML Conversion
(Utilities)
ToolsBaer OST to HTML Conversion Software is a wonderful solution that converts OST to HTML format quickly and easily. Users can quickly convert OST files to HTML files with the help of this tool. The software that converts OST files to HTML can handle OST files with ease. The program's batch conversion capability allows users to convert OST to HTML layout in bulk. It only takes three or four simple steps to transfer this highly user-friendly application. Utilizing the software does not need users to be extremely adept at using technology. Users can convert a folder holding a few OST updates to HTML using the OST to HTML Conversion program. The Outlook OST to HTML program supports every version of Microsoft Outlook, including 2021, 2019, 2016, 2013, 2010, 2007, and previous versions. You can utilize the free demo version of the OST to HTML Conversion program on any Windows operating system, such as 11, 10, 8, 8.1, 7, XP, Vista, and others. The most recent demo version of this software is available for free download and use.
Read More: - http://www.toolsbaer.com/ost-to-html-conversion/
[read more]
item.description:

It only takes three or four simple steps to transfer this highly user-friendly application. Utilizing the software does not need users to be extremely adept at using technology. Users can convert a folder holding a few OST updates to HTML using the OST to HTML Conversion program. The Outlook OST to HTML program supports every version of Microsoft Outlook, including 2021, 2019, 2016, 2013, 2010, 2007, and previous versions. You can utilize the free demo version of the OST to HTML Conversion program on any Windows operating system, such as 11, 10, 8, 8.1, 7, XP, Vista, and others. The most recent demo version of this software is available for free download and use.

item.title: Windows Data Files Undelete [Office Apps]
item.itunes:title: Windows Data Files Undelete [Office Apps]
item.itunes:author: datarecoverytools
item.itunes:summary:
Windows Data Files Undelete
(Office Apps)
Windows Undelete data recovery utility is GUI based read only user friendly software which recover all deleted formatted files folders root directory NTFS FAT partition system folders and other lost data. It provides complete restoration of lost deleted missing inaccessible files folders formatted hard disk. Accidentally deleted formatted NTFS, NTFS5, FAT16, FAT32, FAT partition are easily recovered by software. This is easy to use and non destructive tool with very familiar options which support SCSI, IDE, EIDE, ATA, SATA hard disk. Undelete utility unerase erased lost word excel power point database files like ppt doc xls mdb. Also recover damaged windows files format like mp3 wav wma PNG BMP GIF JPEG JPG PSD AVI DAT MPEG MPG MIDI MOV exe zip of audio, video, music movies, pictures, songs, images files from Windows 11,Windows 10,Windows 8,Windows 7 and Vista operating system. Restoration tool recover corrupted erased DBR dos boot record, MBR master boot record, FAT file allocation table and MFT master file table due to virus, hardware malfunction, improper shutdown, power failure, threats and system crash. Multi storage hard disk like PAN, SCSI, IDE, EIDE and SATA are also recovered.Features::* Software provides complete recovery of reformatted disk volume.* Detects old partition records to rebuild file structure.* Software recover files also when recycle bin has been emptied.* Utility detects and rescue corrupted not detected missing lost erased files.* Utility restores compressed and encrypted data files folders.* Long file names also supported by Restoration Software.* Undelete software completely recover bad sectors from hard disk.* Provides data recovery also when files and folders have been deleted by Shift and delete key.* Undelete lost files folders due to deletion of corrupted, damaged, overwritten, logical crashes and formatted partitions.

[read more]
item.description:
Windows Data Files Undelete
(Office Apps)
Windows Undelete data recovery utility is GUI based read only user friendly software which recover all deleted formatted files folders root directory NTFS FAT partition system folders and other lost data. It provides complete restoration of lost deleted missing inaccessible files folders formatted hard disk. Accidentally deleted formatted NTFS, NTFS5, FAT16, FAT32, FAT partition are easily recovered by software. This is easy to use and non destructive tool with very familiar options which support SCSI, IDE, EIDE, ATA, SATA hard disk. Undelete utility unerase erased lost word excel power point database files like ppt doc xls mdb. Also recover damaged windows files format like mp3 wav wma PNG BMP GIF JPEG JPG PSD AVI DAT MPEG MPG MIDI MOV exe zip of audio, video, music movies, pictures, songs, images files from Windows 11,Windows 10,Windows 8,Windows 7 and Vista operating system. Restoration tool recover corrupted erased DBR dos boot record, MBR master boot record, FAT file allocation table and MFT master file table due to virus, hardware malfunction, improper shutdown, power failure, threats and system crash. Multi storage hard disk like PAN, SCSI, IDE, EIDE and SATA are also recovered.Features::* Software provides complete recovery of reformatted disk volume.* Detects old partition records to rebuild file structure.* Software recover files also when recycle bin has been emptied.* Utility detects and rescue corrupted not detected missing lost erased files.* Utility restores compressed and encrypted data files folders.* Long file names also supported by Restoration Software.* Undelete software completely recover bad sectors from hard disk.* Provides data recovery also when files and folders have been deleted by Shift and delete key.* Undelete lost files folders due to deletion of corrupted, damaged, overwritten, logical crashes and formatted partitions.

[read more]

This is easy to use and non destructive tool with very familiar options which support SCSI, IDE, EIDE, ATA, SATA hard disk. Also recover damaged windows files format like mp3 wav wma PNG BMP GIF JPEG JPG PSD AVI DAT MPEG MPG MIDI MOV exe zip of audio, video, music movies, pictures, songs, images files from Windows 11,Windows 10,Windows 8,Windows 7 and Vista operating system. item.title: Undelete Files Mac [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Undelete Files Mac [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: undeletefilesmac
item.itunes:summary:
Undelete Files Mac
(Utilities)
Excellent featured mac file data retrieval program does not require any prior technical knowledge or training to operate software for lost or corrupted data restoration. Powerful yet simple undelete files mac utility is very easy to use due to its highly interactive graphical user interface that makes task of lost or damaged data restoration easier and quicker. Buy Mac data restoration tool to get lifelong solution for all lost data retrieval problem within minimal cost and time limit and by applying minimal efforts. Demo version of mac data recovery program is available at company website www.undeletefilesmac.com to get familiar with software features, functionalities and working capabilities before purchasing licensed version of software. Efficient mac retrieval program regain lost data back in original form. Undelete files mac provides easiest, cost effective and economical mean to regain erased, deleted or formatted data including images, pictures, text files, songs, music files and audio-video file from apple osx storage devices. Simple usb mac data recover software restores lost, corrupted or logically crashed data from usb drive, thumb drive and key chain drive easily within few mouse clicks. Reliable and trust worthy mac data recovery tool maintains integrity of data files and folders during data restoration and retrieval process. Comprehensive undelete files mac application restores all formats of lost and erased data files at reasonable and affordable price. Features: * Trust worthy mac data restoration tool does not cause any harm to contents of lost and erased data files. * Proficient mac recovery software provides optimized and best solution to regain erased or deleted data files. * Undelete files mac retrieval program is prominent and reliable tool to retrieve lost data from logically crashed storage device. * Best featured lost file mac recovery software has easy and simple to use graphical user interface that makes data retrieval quicker.

[read more]

item.title: Recover Memory Card Data [Office Apps]
item.itunes:title: Recover Memory Card Data [Office Apps]
item.itunes:author: datarecoverytools
item.itunes:summary:
Recover Memory Card Data
(Office Apps)
Website www.recover.co.in offers highly interactive Recover Memory Card Data application that swiftly retrieves all intentionally erased official or personal files. Data retrieval software allow you to rescue missing data saved in various file extensions including jpeg, png, tiff, exif, emf, wmf, png, bmp, mov, midi, mpeg, txt, ppt and others in simplified manner. Memory card regaining utility allows you to save recovered files at users defined location in computer system or laptop for future reference.

[read more]

item.content:encoded:
Recover Memory Card Data
(Office Apps)
Website www.recover.co.in offers highly interactive Recover Memory Card Data application that swiftly retrieves all intentionally erased official or personal files. Data retrieval software allow you to rescue missing data saved in various file extensions including jpeg, png, tiff, exif, emf, wmf, png, bmp, mov, midi, mpeg, txt, ppt and others in simplified manner. Memory card regaining utility allows you to save recovered files at users defined location in computer system or laptop for future reference.

[read more]

item.title: Removable Disk Undelete [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Removable Disk Undelete [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: datarecovery1
item.itunes:summary:
Removable Disk Undelete
(Utilities)
Removable USB drive encrypted data recovery software restores accidentally deleted data file, images, movie, documents and presentations quickly. Affordable files recovery software rescue corrupted file documents from pen drives, USB hard disk, thumb drive and SD, XD multimedia card. Disaster recovery solutions use GUI files recovery wizard for restoration of word, excel documents, PowerPoint slides, ZIP PDF files, pictures, audio and video file.

[read more]

item.title: Mac Removable Media File Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Mac Removable Media File Recovery [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: undeletefilesmac
item.itunes:summary:
Mac Removable Media File Recovery
(Utilities)
User can easily download Mac Removable Media File Recovery utility on Mac PC that allows you to regain lost files and folders including photo, pictures, music, songs, and audio/video within just fraction of seconds without any need of applying technical skills. File recovery program supports all types of formats of any document, multimedia audio, video, image etc for proper salvage of lost directories and folders.
